story.title: Startup founders urge U.S. government not to shut off Chinese open weight AI

draft:
I'm concerned about the potential implications of shutting off Chinese open-source AI. 
As a developer, I rely on global collaboration to drive innovation. 
The U.S. government's consideration of this move raises questions about the future of open-source development.
Will this set a precedent for restricting access to other foreign technologies?
#AI #OpenSource #TechPolicy
